narrative:
Cleveland Heights City has 34,459 registered voters, with 50.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 46.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 42.9 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +22.3% D−R vs +56.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
